---
agent: Instructions Generator Agent
---


Take the information below and generate a  [NAME].instructions.md file for it in the /.github/instructions directory. generate an appropriate name for the [NAME] placeholder based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
